subcodes.first_line: This is indeed evident and manifest that under no circumstances is the Truth, exalted be His mention, content that any soul should transgress against another [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این بسی معلوم و واضح است که ابدا حق جل ذکره راضی نه که احدی بر احدی تعدی
subcodes.subjects: @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @return of the Manifestations of God, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
